title: Ikaw ang mahal ko
overview: Pilo, a mild-mannered bodyguard meets Miling, an old-fashioned girl who stows away when she learns that her aunt has betrothed her to the richest man in town. They quickly become enemies, but when they are meant to stay together, it doesn't really matter if their first meeting was disastrous.

trailers.title: Lagot ka Daking! Sulong Miling, Asbaran mo! | Ikaw ang Mahal Ko | HD | Fernando Poe Jr.
